nasb.text: Arise, go up against a nation which is at ease, Which lives securely,” declares the Lord. “It has no gates or bars; They dwell alone.

esv.text: “Rise up, advance against a nation at ease, that dwells securely, declares the Lord, that has no gates or bars, that dwells alone.

cnv.text: “起來！上去攻打那安逸無慮的國家； 這國沒有城門，也沒有門閂； 他們是獨自居住的。

ccb.text: 迦勒底人啊， 上去攻打那安逸无忧、无门无闩、独居一方的国家吧！ 这是耶和华说的。
